module_info.docstring: Base protocol and data classes for source adapters.

classes.name: RawDiscovery
classes.docstring: A raw finding from a source adapter before scoring.

classes.name: EnrichedDiscovery
classes.docstring: A discovery enriched with additional context from the source.

methods.name: fetch
methods.docstring:
Fetch new items from the source since the given datetime.

Args:
    since: Only return items newer than this
    topics: Interest topics to filter/search by

Returns:
    List of raw discoveries

methods.name: enrich
methods.docstring:
Enrich a raw discovery with additional context.

Default implementation just copies fields. Adapters can override
to fetch abstracts, README content, etc.
